CE Autumn/Winter New Teen Lola Signature Print Handbag 👜.
Another masterpiece from the Arc de Triomphe family. Teen Lola is online with TRIO MPHE snap closure. It features 1 interior compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. It can easily fit a phone, compact powder, lipstick, small card holder, and other daily necessities! Not only is it small, exquisite, and cute, but it can also be carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder for various styles 🫶🏻

. 🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Series Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from white calfskin leather, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde design.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap, adorned with a classic snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and a BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Size: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104

💝 Goyard Alto Round Box Bag is also a Hat Box Bag 🎩
Alto bag is a highly representative classic hat box bag that combines the essence of Goyard's box-making craftsmanship: Poplar wooden frame, round calfskin handle, closure buckle system, and iconic yellow lining. While appearing small, it has amazing capacity, can hold a mobile phone 📱 keys 🔑 lipstick 💄 small leather goods and other daily items.
The strap is adjustable and detachable, elegant for hand-carry, stylish for shoulder carry, super A and eye-catching 😍, comes with original gift box 🎁
Size: 18*16.5*7cm
